title: Nadanthal Irandadi Lyrics Chembaruthi
stanzas:
Nadanthal irandadi
irundhaal naankadi
Nadanthal irandadi
irundhaal naankadi
paduthaal aaradi podhum
indha nilavum
andha vaanamum
adhu ellorukum sondham

rekkai ulla kunju idhu
koodu onnum thevaiyillai
buthi ulla pillai idhu
kettu nikka povathillai

theruvoram kidanthum
anaathai illai.
uravennai veruthaal
thinam tharuven thollai.

aanaikatti bore aditha
appa suppan kaanavillai.
andru mudhal indru varai
akkaramum vazhavillai.

vetta vetta vazhai thaan
adhu alli tharum vazhai thaan.
vetti poata mannuthaan
adhai katti kaaththaa
ponnuthaan.

naan vazhum vazhve
adhu sila kaalam thaan.
uravodu vazhnthaal
adhu pookolam thaan.

Nadanthal irandadi
irundhaal naankadi
Nadanthal irandadi
irundhaal naankadi
paduthaal aaradi podhum
indha nilavum
andha vaanamum
adhu ellorukum sondham

adi solladi gyanappenne
unmai solladi gyanapenne
solladi gyanappenne
unmai solladi gyanapenne

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nadanthal Irandadi'?

The song conveys themes of love and connection, emphasizing the bond between two souls.

In which movie is 'Nadanthal Irandadi' featured?

The song is from the movie Chembaruthi.

Who is the singer of 'Nadanthal Irandadi'?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for 'Nadanthal Irandadi'?

The music for this song was composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Nadanthal Irandadi' released?

The song was released on April 17, 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chembaruthi, 'Nadanthal Irandadi' serves as a poignant expression of love and longing. The song's soothing melody, combined with S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's soulful voice, evokes a deep sense of nostalgia. It beautifully encapsulates the emotions of connection and affection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The lyrical depth and musical arrangement by Ilaiyaraaja further enhance its timeless appeal.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nadanthal Irandadi is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia, beautifully rendered by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam. The enchanting composition by Ilaiyaraaja elevates the emotional depth of the song, making it a cherished classic. Dive into the lyrical beauty and musical brilliance that this song offers, and let it transport you to a world of heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: If there is a connection, it is enough for everyone, this moon and that sky are all related to each other.
Hey, tell me, wise girl, speak the truth, wise girl.
If there is a connection, it is enough for everyone, this moon and that sky are all related to each other.
This little bird inside the nest doesn't need anything, the child with wisdom won't leave.
If a mother is there, there is a father too, isn't it?
If there is a father, will the grandmother go away?
Even if the streets are empty, there is no one alone. If you separate from me, I will give you trouble every day.
Even if you hear bad things or good things, it is your name that matters.
Hey, wise girl, speak the truth, wise girl.
If there is a connection, it is enough for everyone, this moon and that sky are all related to each other.
There is no sight of the father who is a bore. From then until now, there has been no sweetness in life.
The banana tree gives fruit, that is the tree that gives. The land that is left behind is what protects the gold.
The way I live is only for some time. Living with relationships is like a flower blooming.
Even if you hear bad things or good things, it is your name that matters.
Hey, wise girl, speak the truth, wise girl.
If there is a connection, it is enough for everyone, this moon and that sky are all related to each other.
Hey, tell me, wise girl, speak the truth, wise girl, tell me, wise girl, speak the truth, wise girl.
If there is a connection, it is enough for everyone, this moon and that sky are all related to each other.
